implemented: Stock ledger (StockLedgerEntry: QtyChange, QtyAfter, ValuationRate, VoucherType, VoucherNo)
Moving-average valuation on receipt (MoveIn) and relief on issue (MoveOut)
Stock transfer (decrements source warehouse, increments destination, total qty conserved)
